Bina_ID.description: Unique numerical identifier assigned to each historical building.

Dosya_Adi.description: Filename with extensions used in coordinate tracking.

Sokak_Adı.description: Street name where the building is located.

Kamera_Lat.description: Latitude of the Google Street View camera position.

Kamera_Lon.description: Longitude of the Google Street View camera position.

Bina_Lat.description: Exact latitude of the building footprint.

Bina_Lon.description: Exact longitude of the building footprint.

Dosya_Yolu.description: File path directory in Google Drive.

Fotoğraf İsmi.description: Filename of the facade image used in the typology and AI analysis.

Kat Sayısı.description: Number of floors, calculated dynamically via YOLO object detection and MeanShift clustering.

Duvar / Cumba Aksı.description: Number of vertical architectural axes or bay windows detected by AI.

Zemin Kat (Fonksiyon).description: Functional usage of the ground floor determined via image thresholding analysis.

Kat Malzemeleri.description: Primary material used on the facade inferred via Canny Edge Detection.

Sembolik_Binalar (KML).description: Additional iconic landmarks integrated dynamically into the dataset from the binalar.kml file.
